title: Add team-aware double-stack and teammate-conflict features
summary: F1 strategy is constrained by the fact that each team runs two cars and may need to double-stack; official F1 glossary and pit-lane reporting show that teammate timing and pit-lane tightness can directly alter when a driver is called in.
rationale: F1 strategy is constrained by the fact that each team runs two cars and may need to double-stack; official F1 glossary and pit-lane reporting show that teammate timing and pit-lane tightness can directly alter when a driver is called in. This is different from generic whole-grid pit-wave features.
implementation_hint: Join a public `Year x Driver -> Team` map, then within each `Race_Year x Team` derive `TeammatePittedThisLap`, `TeammateJustStopped`, `SharedPitWindow`, and `LikelyDoubleStack` features, plus interactions with tight-pit-lane circuits and current position.
expected_effect: Captures pit-box capacity and coordinated team strategy that driver-only or field-only features miss.
risk: Needs accurate yearly team mapping and special handling for reserve drivers or pre-season testing entries.
